content.full_text:
April 11, 1991

Barry Brokaw, Chief of Staff
Senator Daniel Boatwright
Room 3086, State Capitol
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Confirmation of Telephone Advice
Our File No. A-91-115

Dear Mr. Brokaw:

You have requested confirmation of telephone advice provided to you concerning the conflict of interest disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act. (Government Code Sections 81000-91015.)

Your letter correctly summarizes my advice. Senator Boatwright is not required to disclose on his Statement of Economic Interests Form 721 any residence that is exclusively used by him or members of his family and from which no income is derived.

A copy of your letter is enclosed for your convenience.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please contact me at (916) 322-5662.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

by: Colleen McGee
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division

Enclosure
